Exklusiv über Ferratec in der Schweiz: Exclusively available through Ferratec in Switzerland
AMP5 · Exklusiv über Ferratec in der Sch: AMP5 · Exclusively available through Ferratec in Switzerland
Charging infrastructure. Designed as a system.
Modular von einem bis zu mehreren hunder: Modular from one to several hundred charging points. Centrally managed, wired instead of wireless, with minimal installation effort. Designed for over 20 years of operation – expandable, maintainable and future-proof in modules. Distributed, trained and supported by Ferratec Technics AG, your Swiss specialist for e-mobility solutions.
Kein Aufbrechen von Böden, keine instabi: No breaking up floors, no unstable Wi-Fi setups in underground garages, fast commissioning and highly automated operation – the lowest long-term total costs on the market.
Selbstheilende Architektur und zentrale: Self-healing architecture and central control – fewer failures, lower support costs.
Jeder SmartHub ist ein vernetzter, digit: Each SmartHub is a networked, digital distribution unit. Need more charging points? An additional SmartHub is added and automatically networked – up to 54 charging points per SmartHub.
Min. 75 % recyceltes Aluminium, 20+ Jahr: Min. 75% recycled aluminium, 20+ year lifespan, modular design for targeted component replacement instead of complete replacement.
Robustes Aluminium-Gehäuse in Graphitsch: Robust aluminium housing in graphite black (IK10), all components flush-integrated – clean appearance with integrated LED lighting.
Vorbereitet für Plug & Charge und V2G, F: Ready for Plug & Charge and V2G, firmware updates (FOTA) without charging interruption.
Ferratec baut in der Schweiz ein Netzwer: Ferratec is building a network of electrical installers in Switzerland who plan, install and commission AMP5. As a partner, you receive training, direct technical support from Rudolfstetten and access to projects from our marketing.

Technik verstehen – Architektur, Lastman: Understanding the technology – architecture, load management, billing

AMP5 ist ein Mehrpunkt-System – Sie inst: AMP5 is a multi-point system – you don't install individual boxes, but entire projects. That means larger orders and more efficient job sites.
Montieren. Anschliessen. Läuft. – kein W: Mount. Connect. Done. – no Wi-Fi chaos in the underground garage
Das System, das keine Rückrufe kennt – e: The system that needs no callbacks – once installed, reliable for the long term
Schluss mit Box-für-Box – Sie planen und: No more box-by-box – you plan and install entire projects instead of individual wallboxes
Schulung, Hotline zum Schweizer Tech-Tea: Training, hotline to the Swiss tech team, lead forwarding from our marketing
Hinter AMP5 steht AmpSociety, ein etabli: Behind AMP5 is AmpSociety, an established Swedish manufacturer with direct roots in ChargeNode – Sweden's largest charging station operator with over 60,000 charging points in active operation. This experience from the daily operation of one of Europe's largest charging networks flows directly into the hardware development of AMP5.
AMP5 ist aus der Praxis eines Ladenetzbe: AMP5 was born from the practice of a charging network operator. Every design decision – from the wired ConnectBar to the modular component structure to native OCPP 2.0.1 – addresses a concrete problem from daily operations: ease of service, reliability, simple component replacement in the field. Not a lab product, but hardware iterated under real operating conditions – robust, long-lasting, reduced to the essentials.
AMP5 Planner – Projekt erfassen, Offerte: AMP5 Planner – capture project, receive quote.
Mit dem AMP5 Planner erfassen Sie Ihr Pr: With the AMP5 Planner, you capture your project in a structured way in just a few steps and hand it over directly to Ferratec. Number of charging points, mounting type, cable routing and load management are mapped in the tool – so we have all the information we need for a reliable quote.
Interaktive Projektkonfiguration in weni: Interactive project configuration in just a few steps
